records.question: Which suppliers have customer addresses with a date_to of at least 2018-03-24 14:31:59?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT suppliers.supplier_id FROM suppliers
JOIN supplier_addresses ON suppliers.supplier_id = supplier_addresses.supplier_id
JOIN addresses ON supplier_addresses.address_id = addresses.address_id
JOIN customer_addresses ON addresses.address_id = customer_addresses.address_id
WHERE customer_addresses.date_to >= '2018-03-24 14:31:59'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT suppliers.supplier_id
FROM Suppliers suppliers
JOIN Product_Suppliers ps ON suppliers.supplier_id = ps.supplier_id
JOIN Products products ON ps.product_id = products.product_id
JOIN Customer_Addresses ca ON ca.address_id IN (SELECT address_id FROM Supplier_Addresses WHERE supplier_id = suppliers.supplier_id)
WHERE ca.date_to >= '2018-03-24 14:31:59'
